text_too_long: Your message is too long (max ${maxLen} characters).
query_too_long: Your question is too long (max ${maxLen} characters).
input_too_long_for_intent: Your message is too long for this kind of request (max ${maxLen} characters).
intent_failed: Sorry, I couldn't understand your message.
submit_failed: Sorry, I couldn't save that — please try again.
query_failed: Sorry, I couldn't answer that — please try again.
unknown_intent: Sorry, I don't know how to handle that yet.
plugin_error: An internal handler failed. Please try again later.
submit_reject.text_too_short: That text is too short to save (min 4 chars).
submit_reject.text_too_long: That text is too long to save (max ${maxLen} chars).
submit_reject.url_blocked: I can't fetch that URL — it points to a blocked address.
submit_reject.url_invalid: That doesn't look like a valid URL.
submit_reject.unknown: I couldn't save that — please try again.
render.reset.archived: Conversation reset — your next message starts fresh.
render.reset.no_active: No active conversation to reset; the next message starts fresh.
filter.feishu.unsupported_content: ${type} not yet supported — please send text.
callback.expired: That option is no longer available.
